title: India — NRI money compliance
banner: Educational, not tax advice. Cross-border tax has sharp edges — confirm with a CA and a US CPA.

items.title: Convert resident savings accounts to NRO
items.why: Once you're an NRI under FEMA, holding resident accounts is non-compliant. Banks convert in a branch visit or by post.

items.title: Open an NRE account
items.why: Foreign earnings parked in NRE are fully repatriable and interest is India-tax-free while you're NRI.

items.title: Evaluate a GIFT City USD account
items.why: USD deposits in IFSC banks can hold dollars in India without conversion — useful if you're India-bound in 3–5 years.

items.title: Update NRI status in bank + mutual-fund KYC
items.why: Old resident KYC on MF folios creates redemption and tax-reporting problems that take months to unwind.

items.title: File FBAR if foreign accounts exceeded $10k (aggregate, any day)
items.why: All non-US accounts combined, highest balance of the year. Penalties for missing it are brutal even when accidental.

items.title: Check Form 8938 (FATCA) thresholds
items.why: Separate from FBAR, filed with your tax return; thresholds depend on filing status and where you live.

items.title: Set up DTAA relief for India TDS (Form 10F + TRC)
items.why: Without a US Tax Residency Certificate (Form 6166) + Form 10F, Indian payers deduct TDS at the highest rate on your NRO interest and other income.

items.title: Keep PAN active and linked
items.why: PAN-Aadhaar linking rules and inoperative-PAN consequences hit NRIs who ignore Indian filings for years.

items.title: Add nominations on every Indian account
items.why: Unnominated accounts of NRIs are among the hardest assets for families to claim. Fix it in one sitting.
